name: Future Country Club
address: 4401 NW 25th Pl. STE M, Gainesville, FL 32606
about: Future Country Club is a members-only indoor golf venue located in Gainesville, Florida, with two locations. The club offers premium golf simulator experiences using Uneekor technology in private, climate-controlled bays. Membership provides 24/7 access to book tee times via an app, with the option to bring guests and attend member events. The flagship location includes a pro shop, beverage service, and a social lounge space. Memberships have been historically in high demand, often selling out quickly, and a waitlist is currently active.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 member access via app for flexible booking
Private bays ensure no crowds and a focused practice environment
Premium Uneekor simulator technology provides high-fidelity data for improvement
Membership works at two locations for added convenience

food_and_drink.notes: Beer and wine available at the FGX Pro Shop in the flagship location

simulator_hardware.notes: High-fidelity ball tracking and club data used at both locations

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website states that bays have premium clubs and equipment available for use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue provides beer and wine at the FGX Pro Shop. BYO policies are not explicitly mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A specific time for 18 holes is not stated, but members can book tee times via the app, and bays are private.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the venue is explicitly members-only and does not mention any child-oriented activities or facilities.
